title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies Holdings Services in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
